description: Detects repeated or semantically similar Bedrock requests where embedding-based response reuse may reduce inference cost and latency.

severity_rules.name: missing_semantic_cache_for_repeated_queries
severity_rules.condition: similar_query_rate_pct >= 15 AND expected_cache_hit_rate_pct >= 30 AND semantic_cache_layer_absent == true
severity_rules.description: Repeated or similar queries may be served from a semantic cache before invoking Bedrock. Validate quality, freshness, and tenant isolation before rollout.

validation_before_change: Define similarity threshold and measure false-positive answer risk.
Use TTL, invalidation, and tenant isolation for cached answers.
Track cache hit rate, fallback rate, answer quality, and Bedrock cost per route.
